title: Debbie Lee Carrington

'''Debbie Lee Carrington''' ([[December 14]], [[1950s|1959]] - [[March 23]], [[2018]]) was an American actress and stuntwoman who played the [[Ewok]] [[Romba]] in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="CIVOPAGL">{{WebCite|url=http://officialpix.com/OPX/Celebrities.html|text=Celebration IV Official Pix Autograph Guest List|archivedate=20071015144459}}</ref> She also played [[Weechee Warrick]] in ''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]'', and worked on the stunts in both films. Footage of her Ewok character in ''Return of the Jedi'' was used in ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]''.

She also worked on other [[George Lucas]] productions; she is credited as playing "Additional Ducks" in the [[1986]] film [[Wikipedia:Howard the Duck (film)|''Howard the Duck'']], and "Idee" in [[Wikipedia:Captain Eo|''Captain Eo'']].

Carrington went on to have a very successful career in film and television acting.
